div1.entryFree: Discard, to cast off, to expel: welcome home again --ed faith, John V, 4, 12. I here d. my sickness, Caes. II, 1, 321 (cf. discharge in Wint. II, 3, 11). the fountain from the which my current runs, to be --ed thence! Oth. IV, 2, 61. Especially, == to dismiss from service: Wiv. I, 3, 6. II, 1, 182. Tw. III, 4, 99. H4A IV, 2, 30. Used in contempt: H4A I, 3, 178. Lr. III, 4, 74.
